title: Young Franky and Iceburg
description: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
summary: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
